## Project: NestJS + TypeScript + Prisma Location-Based Post Sharing App

- Clean Architecture with Feature-Based Modular Structure
- pnpm monorepo
- PostgreSQL in Docker with Prisma ORM
- SOLID principles, typed functions, async/await

## Next Steps to Run:

1. Start PostgreSQL: `pnpm db:up`
2. Run migrations: `pnpm db:migrate`
3. Start dev server: `pnpm dev`

## Documentation:

- README.md - Full documentation
- QUICKSTART.md - Quick start guide (5 minutes)
- ARCHITECTURE.md - Architecture deep dive
- DEVELOPER_GUIDE.md - Developer guide with examples
- PROJECT_SUMMARY.md - Complete project summary
- examples/api-requests.http - Sample API requests
